message:
feat(conformance): expand normalization harness with 900+ lines of test coverage

Substantial expansion of conformance normalization unit tests (bd-k5q5.7.2)
covering previously untested edge cases:

- Deeply nested mixed-field normalization (nested objects + arrays)
- Array-of-events normalization preserving semantic content
- Empty structures left unchanged
- Null/boolean/number scalar passthrough
- Nested array-of-arrays recursion
- PID, port, hostname, and session_id redaction at various depths
- Path normalization with tilde, project root, and test root variants
- Mixed semantic/ephemeral field preservation in complex documents
- String values containing embedded timestamps and UUIDs
- Large array processing with consistent placeholder application

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
